headline: Move Over, AST SpaceMobile: Alphabet Has a Surprising New No. 1 Holding... and It's From the Financial Sector
summary: Google parent Alphabet has taken a $1 billion stake in a company that holds a virtual monopoly in a niche segment of the financial services market.
